raw_consumer_statement: 2 fraudulent purchases were charged to my Home Depot Citi Card on XX/XX/XXXX, in XXXX, California, totaling {$280.00}. I was on vacation in Arizona at the time and my card was at home on my desk in XXXX XXXX, California. Home Depot Citi Card fraud services called and texted me multiple times that day to notify me of suspicious charges. I called back when I returned to California 2 days later, and spoke with them and confirmed that I did not make the purchases. The person I spoke to confirmed that I was confirming that they were fraudulent charges, and cancelled my card and mailed a new one. On XX/XX/XXXX, I received my statement via email showing that the charges were still on my account. So I called in again and spoke with someone who told me that the fraud department was still investigating, so it should be resolved soon. On XX/XX/XXXX, I received an email that my payment is due, showing the fraudulent charges still there. Today, XX/XX/XXXX, I called to ask for the status of the fraud investigation, since the payment is due soon. And today I was told that the charges were never reported as fraudulent. They are the ones who reported it to me. I called back to confirm. And called to check on it a second time. And only on the third call was I told that it was never reported as fraud. I have no faith that they will make sure it is investigated as a fraud.
